ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test case */,
  "method" TEXT /* Testing methodology used (e.g., Blackbox, Whitebox) */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type being tested (e.g., Boundary, Erroneous, Typical) */,
  "test_desc" TEXT /* Description of the test case */,
  "test_data" TEXT /* Data used for testing */,
  "prediction" TEXT /* Expected prediction from the test */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Actual outcome of the test */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes regarding the test case */,
  "test_version" TEXT /* Version of the test case */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the test case */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the test case */,
  "test_duration" TEXT /* Expected or actual duration of the test */,
  "test_environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the test was executed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tests_method FOREIGN KEY ("method") REFERENCES test_methods ("method_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tests_data_type FOREIGN KEY ("data_type") REFERENCES data_types ("type_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each testing method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the testing method (e.g., Blackbox, Whitebox) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the testing method */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the testing method is currently in use */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the testing method */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the testing method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type (e.g., Boundary, Erroneous, Typical) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the data type is currently in use */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the data type */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the data type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_executions" (
  "execution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test execution record */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case being executed */,
  "execution_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was executed */,
  "executed_by" TEXT /* User who executed the test */,
  "execution_status" TEXT /* Status of the test execution (e.g., Pass, Fail, Blocked) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the test execution */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the test execution */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the test was executed */,
  "test_version" TEXT /* Version of the test case */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("execution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_executions_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test case record */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the corresponding test */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the test case belongs to */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the test case was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the test case was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the test case (e.g., Draft, Approved, In Progress, Completed) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the test case */,
  "test_version" TEXT /* Version of the test case */,
  "test_steps" TEXT /* Detailed steps for executing the test case */,
  "preconditions" TEXT /* Preconditions that need to be met before running the test case */,
  "postconditions" TEXT /* Postconditions that should be verified after running the test case */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., Planned, In Progress, Completed) */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "actual_cost" TEXT /* Actual cost incurred for the project */,
  "client" TEXT /* Client for the project */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Tester, Developer, Project Manager) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the report is related to */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report findings */,
  "detailed_report" TEXT /* Detailed report document */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* User who generated the report */,
  "test_version" TEXT /* Version of the test case */,
  "test_environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the tests were executed */,
  "total_tests" INTEGER /* Total number of tests executed */,
  "passed_tests" INTEGER /* Number of tests that passed */,
  "failed_tests" INTEGER /* Number of tests that failed */,
  "blocked_tests" INTEGER /* Number of tests that were blocked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_reports_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_defects" (
  "defect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each defect */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case associated with the defect */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the defect (e.g., Critical, Major, Minor) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the defect (e.g., Open, In Progress, Resolved) */,
  "reported_date" TEXT /* Date the defect was reported */,
  "assigned_to" TEXT /* User to whom the defect is assigned */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date the defect was resolved */,
  "resolution_notes" TEXT /* Notes on how the defect was resolved */,
  "test_version" TEXT /* Version of the test case */,
  "test_environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the defect was found */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("defect_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_defects_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case being referred to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback provided */,
  "submitted_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was submitted */,
  "test_version" TEXT /* Version of the test case */,
  "test_environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the test was executed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_feedback_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
